sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21721" key="ge/enna" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γέεννα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ης</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Hebr. <sense id="n21721.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gé-hinnóm</tr_>, the <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">valley of Hinnom</tr_>, which represented <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the place of future punishment,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Matt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.22</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
